description: CompositionBlack bottoms with a jean look made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, with an elasticated waist, printed brand badge and printed loops on the waistFittingSlimWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironSlim is in! So flaunt your lovely long legs in style in these skinny polyester pants from jealous 21. The complete jean-effect print gives it a denim look, while the stretchable polyester makes it an absolutely comfortable wear. Team this with girly tops and heeled sandals for that feminine touch.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 39"Height: 5'8&rdquo Waist: 26&rdquo Hips: 36&rdquo
